title: spergularia modesta var. salinaria
intro: Spergularia modesta var. salinaria, also known as saltwort wintergrass or sea sand sparrow-grass, is a perennial or annual plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Spergularia modesta var. salinaria include its potential to treat various ailments such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Spergularia modesta var. salinaria is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for topical applications.
